name: Macadamia, Raspberry, White Chocolate Cookies
recipeIngredient: 8 oz White chocolate chips or chopped white chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugars until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg and vanilla to the mixture, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the raspberry jam.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the flour and baking soda.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring just until combined.
6. Mix in the chopped macadamia nuts and white chocolate chips.
7. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto lightly greased cookie sheets, spacing about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes. Do not overbake.
9. Allow to cool on wire racks before serving.
